title: I Want That Back
description: A small quality of life mod that lets you be able to get something back from minecarts with hoppers/chests/furnaces/tnt as well as chest boats.
body:
## A small quality of life mod that lets you be able to get something back from minecarts with hoppers/chests/furnaces/tnt as well as chest boats.

Because it is very annoying to make a hopper minecart and then just sigh in pain when you need the hopper back.
